sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check positions 3 and 4 cycles quickly
# Current cursor is at position 2 (cols 29-33)

# Move to position 3
action(['RIGHT'])
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
pink3 = [n['hash'] for n in nodes if n['id'] == 52][0]
print(f"Position 3 (id 52): {pink3}")

# Cycle UP 8 times to find the cycle
cycle3 = [pink3]
for i in range(8):
    action(['UP'])
    seg = current_frame.segmentation
    nodes = seg['nodes']
    h = [n['hash'] for n in nodes if n['id'] == 52][0]
    cycle3.append(h)
    print(f"  UP {i+1}: {h}")

# Find cycle
for i in range(len(cycle3)):
    for j in range(i+1, len(cycle3)):
        if cycle3[i] == cycle3[j]:
            cycle3_unique = cycle3[i:j]
            print(f"  Cycle length: {j-i}")
            break
    else:
        continue
    break
else:
    cycle3_unique = cycle3

# Check top P symbols in cycle
top_P = ['cddd7d2c6a6ceea0', 'd38ad0a046a963a0', 'fb80c9b281b063da', 'f4469c244897540c', '12ee96cc93cd3e0a', 'b4edb3faf810133b']
for h in cycle3_unique:
    if h in top_P:
        print(f"  MATCH: {h} = top P[{top_P.index(h)}]")

# Now move to position 4
action(['RIGHT'])
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
pink4 = [n['hash'] for n in nodes if n['id'] == 53][0]
print(f"\nPosition 4 (id 53): {pink4}")

# Cycle UP 8 times
cycle4 = [pink4]
for i in range(8):
    action(['UP'])
    seg = current_frame.segmentation
    nodes = seg['nodes']
    h = [n['hash'] for n in nodes if n['id'] == 53][0]
    cycle4.append(h)
    print(f"  UP {i+1}: {h}")

# Find cycle
for i in range(len(cycle4)):
    for j in range(i+1, len(cycle4)):
        if cycle4[i] == cycle4[j]:
            cycle4_unique = cycle4[i:j]
            print(f"  Cycle length: {j-i}")
            break
    else:
        continue
    break
else:
    cycle4_unique = cycle4

# Check top P symbols in cycle
for h in cycle4_unique:
    if h in top_P:
        print(f"  MATCH: {h} = top P[{top_P.index(h)}]")

# Print current pink state
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
pink = [(n['id'], n['hash']) for n in nodes if n['id'] in [49, 50, 51, 52, 53]]
print(f"\nCurrent pink: {pink}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
